description: baseline Qwen2.5-14B Q4_K_M @ d=2048 (ngl=99 fa=on b=2048 ub=512 t=8 poll=50 f16 kv); ppl reference
KV cache q8_0 — real -10% tg for only ~0.2GB VRAM; quality fine (+0.07%) but bad trade
flash attn off — real -17% tg / -27% pp; fa on strongly confirmed
nkvo=1 (KV off GPU) — -74% tg, PCIe round-trips per step
poll=0 — tg tie within drift; pp +4.5% (not the objective)
threads 8->16 — tg tie within drift (neutral when fully offloaded)
PHASE2 server no-spec baseline (clock 1811MHz; server path, short prompt)
spec draft 0.5B n_max=3 — +7% (51% accept); VRAM 11.2 over budget
spec draft 0.5B n_max=8 — +24% over no-spec (30% accept, clock~1890), reproducible; BEST so far; VRAM 11.2 over 11GB budget
spec n_max=16 — counterproductive (-22%): draft too long, rejected tokens waste compute
spec n_max=10 — +17%, near-second to n_max=8 (locked clock 1799)
n_max=8 p_min=0.9 — 97% accept but tg collapses to ~baseline; want max tokens/step not max accept
n_max=8 Q4 draft — 32.0 vs Q8 35.7; Q4 draft loses accuracy (27% vs 30% accept), net slower
n_max=8 p_min=0.6 — 34.9, 75% accept but still < p_min=0 (clock 1787)
spec n_max=4 — 32.0 but THROTTLED (clock 1778, power-cap); below n_max=8
spec n_max=12 — 31.1, declines past the n_max=8/10 peak (clock 1800)
spec n_max=14 — 29.1, approaching no-spec; over-drafting (clock 1799)
no-spec temp=0.7 — = temp0 within noise (30.2); SAMPLING IS FREE for plain gen
spec n_max=8 temp=0.7 — accept 30%->24%, spec gain shrinks +20%->+5%; high temp hurts spec
spec n_max=8 temp=0.7 min_p=0.1 — sharper dist partially recovers (24.3% accept), still < temp0
